systems.system_notes: Distal fibula locking plate family within the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio for lateral malleolus and distal fibula fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes product and technique materials describe dedicated distal fibula plating instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe the distal fibula plate family.
Official inventory materials describe compatible screw fixation for the distal fibula plate system.
Official technique resources describe guide and instrumentation workflow for fibula plate application.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the distal fibula plate family and inventory references, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper sterile implant listing or broader parts-matrix pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
